request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws hold back our ability to protect Americans. The 2024 London attacks showed what happens when we don't give our agencies the tools they need. My neighbor's son, a cop in Chicago, tells me the same thing - they're fighting with one hand tied. We need to update these laws to keep up with real threats. #NationalSecurityFirst
